purpose: Guardrail profile for improving the GX Prototype Lab Anti-Heroes third-person city sandbox without replacing working game code with a generic template.

must_preserve: The Anti-Heroes remains a third-person Panda3D prototype, not a detached launcher or web-only demo.
Ground traversal is the default player route; flight or high-speed movement must be explicit/toggle-based.
Existing combat, menu, editor, city, NPC, and imported-body systems must not be removed during validation passes.
The player-visible route must be tested, not only an isolated proof scene.
HUD stays edge-oriented and readable with no center-screen debug clutter.
must_improve_toward: Readable city districts with clear avenue route spines and landmarks.
Hero/villain stance state that can influence reputation, faction response, and mission routing.
District control, contract board, vendor/rearm, and safehouse/service-room anchors.
Street-level traversal with stable spawn, camera, collision, and readable ground surfaces.
Destruction aftermath and faction/NPC pressure that can be validated from state data or screenshots.
must_not_do: Do not replace Anti-Heroes with a newly generated starter template.
Do not add broad unrelated features before route stability and proof hooks exist.
Do not claim visual/gameplay success without a screenshot or scene-proof JSON when a Panda3D runtime is available.
Do not hide crashes behind silent fallback behavior.
Do not move the player to the wrong HoloVerse region while validating Anti-Heroes.

runtime_checks: syntax/import validation across Anti-Heroes Python files
asset-reference validation for local Anti-Heroes assets
Panda3D runtime smoke when system, portable, or packaged runtime is present
screenshot proof when runtime can render
regression comparison against a baseline when a baseline tree is provided

recommended_work_order_command: improve The Anti-Heroes as a third-person city sandbox: preserve existing combat/editor/menu systems, make districts and street traversal more readable, add hero-villain stance and service anchors only where safe, and verify with Panda3D proof instead of placeholders
recommended_commands: python bridge.py plan-command <antiheroes_project> --profile panda3d --command-file reports/antiheroes_command.txt --output reports/antiheroes_work_order.json

python bridge.py full-pass <antiheroes_project> --profile panda3d --work-order reports/antiheroes_work_order.json --runtime auto --smoke --entry main.py --screenshot-path screenshots/antiheroes_gptool_probe.png --require-screenshot
